mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, course_name, course_time, not_poor_num, total_num, grade_limit, available_num, deadline, course_location
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from wings_course
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into wings_course (gmt_create, gmt_modified, course_name, course_time, not_poor_num, total_num, grade_limit, available_num, deadline, course_location, course_desc) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into wings_course
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
course_name,
course_time,
not_poor_num,
total_num,
grade_limit,
available_num,
deadline,
course_location,
course_desc,
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update wings_course
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_time = #{record.courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
not_poor_num = #{record.notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_num = #{record.totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
grade_limit = #{record.gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
available_num = #{record.availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
deadline = #{record.deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
course_location = #{record.courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_desc = #{record.courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update wings_course set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_time = #{record.courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, not_poor_num = #{record.notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_num = #{record.totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, grade_limit = #{record.gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, available_num = #{record.availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deadline = #{record.deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_location = #{record.courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{record.courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update wings_course set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_time = #{record.courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, not_poor_num = #{record.notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_num = #{record.totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, grade_limit = #{record.gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, available_num = #{record.availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deadline = #{record.deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_location = #{record.courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update wings_course
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_time = #{courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
not_poor_num = #{notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_num = #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
grade_limit = #{gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
available_num = #{availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
deadline = #{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
course_location = #{courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_desc = #{courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update wings_course set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_time = #{courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, not_poor_num = #{notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_num = #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, grade_limit = #{gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, available_num = #{availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deadline = #{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_location = #{courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{courseDesc,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update wings_course set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_time = #{courseTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, not_poor_num = #{notPoorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_num = #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, grade_limit = #{gradeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, available_num = #{availableNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deadline = #{deadline,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, course_location = #{courseLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
